conditions: 6 AM—Rise and greet a fresh Friday morning, Jackson. Rendezvous Mountain is waiting for your tender touch with 7 inches of high-grade pow over the past 24 hours. 2 of those buffed things up after the lifts closed, smoothing out yesterday's slashes and deepening any untouched stashes. Clouds, sunshine, and snow showers will all make appearances today thanks to an indecisive atmosphere that's in the mood to play. High temperatures will stall out in the upper teens outside Corbet's Cabin, while Teton Village makes a bid for the upper 30s. Cool north-northwest winds will be breezing in the 5-20 mph range. Periodic doses of powder flotation are more intoxicating than any available libation. Yet somehow far healthier than treatments suggested by the American Medical Association. So, don't feel bad about blowing work off for the slopes. Just chalk it all up to preventive medication. -Lege
